testcase.name: Login with valid credentials - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to Login page..........................................passed When User enters valid email address "akash@gmail.com"......................passed And User enters valid password "12345"......................................passed And User clicks on Login button.............................................passed Then User should login successfully.........................................passed

testcase.name: Login with valid credentials - #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to Login page..........................................passed When User enters valid email address "akash@gmail.com"......................passed And User enters valid password "12345"......................................passed And User clicks on Login button.............................................passed Then User should login successfully.........................................passed

testcase.name: Login with invalid credentials
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to Login page..........................................passed When User enters invalid email address "wrong@gmail.com"....................passed And User enters invalid password "1234567"..................................passed And User clicks on Login button.............................................passed Then User login should get a proper warning message.........................passed

testcase.name: Login with valid email address and invalid password
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to Login page..........................................passed When User enters valid email address "akash@gmail.com"......................passed And User enters invalid password "1234567"..................................passed And User clicks on Login button.............................................passed Then User should get a proper warning message...............................passed

testcase.name: Login with invalid email address and valid password
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to Login page..........................................passed When User enters invalid email address "wrong@gmail.com"....................passed And User enters valid password "12345"......................................passed And User clicks on Login button.............................................passed Then User should get a proper warning message...............................passed

testcase.name: Login without providing any credentials
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to Login page..........................................passed When User does not enter any credentials....................................passed And User clicks on Login button.............................................passed Then User should get a proper warning message...............................passed

testcase.name: Register with mandatory fields
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to Register Account page...............................passed Given User navigates to Login page..........................................passed When User enters firstname "Akash" into the First Name field................passed And User enters lastname "Sabar" into the Last Name field...................passed And User enters email address "akashsabar@gmail.com" into the Email field...passed And User enters phone number "9999333300" into the Phone field..............passed And User enters password "12345" into the Password field....................passed And User enters password "12345" into the Password Confirm field............passed And User selects Privacy Policy field.......................................passed And User clicks on Continue button..........................................passed Then Account should get successfully created................................passed

testcase.name: Register with mandatory fields and newsletter
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to Register Account page...............................passed Given User navigates to Login page..........................................passed When User enters firstname "Akash" into the First Name field................passed And User enters lastname "Sabar" into the Last Name field...................passed And User enters email address "akashsabar@gmail.com" into the Email field...passed And User enters phone number "9999333300" into the Phone field..............passed And User enters password "12345" into the Password field....................passed And User enters password "12345" into the Password Confirm field............passed And User selects Yes for Newsletter.........................................passed And User selects Privacy Policy field.......................................passed And User clicks on Continue button..........................................passed Then Account should get successfully created................................passed

testcase.name: Register without providing any fields
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to Register Account page...............................passed Given User navigates to Register Account page...............................passed When User does not enter details into any fields............................passed And User clicks on Continue button..........................................passed Then Warning messages should be displayed for the mandatory fields..........passed

testcase.name: Register with duplicate email address
testcase.system-out: Given User navigates to Register Account page...............................passed Given User navigates to Register Account page...............................passed When User enters firstname "Akash" into the First Name field................passed And User enters lastname "Sabar" into the Last Name field...................passed And User enters email address "akashsabar9@gmail.com" into the Email field..passed And User enters phone number "9999333300" into the Phone field..............passed And User enters password "12345" into the Password field....................passed And User enters password "12345" into the Password Confirm field............passed And User selects Yes for Newsletter.........................................passed And User selects Privacy Policy field.......................................passed And User clicks on Continue button..........................................passed Then Warning message informing the User about duplicate email should be displayed.passed

testcase.name: Search for a valid product
testcase.system-out: Given User opens the Application............................................passed Given User opens the Application............................................passed When User enters valid product into Search field............................passed And User clicks on Search button............................................passed Then Valid Product should get displayed in search results...................passed

testcase.name: Search for a non-existing product
testcase.system-out: Given User opens the Application............................................passed Given USer open the Application.............................................passed When User enter non-existing product into Search field......................passed And User click on Search button.............................................passed Then Proper text informing the User about no product matching should be displayed.passed

testcase.name: Search without providing product
testcase.system-out: Given User opens the Application............................................passed Given USer open the Application.............................................passed When User dont enter any product into Search field..........................passed And User click on Search button.............................................passed Then Proper text informing the User about no product matching should be displayed.passed
